overview.description: The State Street My2035 Corporate Bond ETF (MYCO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund of investment grade corporate bonds with effective maturities in 2035. Bonds are USD-denominated. MYCO was launched on Sep 16, 2025 and is issued by State Street.
